alkylation reagent: alkylated (40 mM CAA, 30 min, 20 °C in the dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (40 mM CAA, 30 min, 20 °C in the dark)
cleavage agent: Proteins were digested at 37 °C for 16 h using trypsin and lysC
enrichment method: characterize the protein interactome of AATF by affinity-purification mass spectrometry (AP-MS)
labeling: labeled on column using triplex dimethyl labelling
